[TensorRT-LLM] TensorRT LLM version: 1.3.0rc10
1.3.0rc10 container_image=nvcr.io/nvidia/tensorrt-llm/release:1.3.0rc10
config_yaml:
cuda_graph_config:
    enable_padding: true
    max_batch_size: 4
enable_attention_dp: false
print_iter_log: true
kv_cache_config:
    dtype: fp8
    free_gpu_memory_fraction: 0.8
    enable_block_reuse: false
stream_interval: 10
moe_config:
    backend: TRTLLM
